title: Shawn Levy to Direct Original Sci-Fi  Drama ‘Somewhere Out There’ for Netflix
content:
ByJazz Tangcay

Artisans Editor

Shawn Levyis set to direct the original sci-fi movie “Somewhere Out There” for Netflix.

The streamer picked up the spec script written by Max Taxe in a bidding war. Levy will also produce the film under his 21 Laps banner along with the company’s Dan Levine.

The story falls in the emotional vein of “Arrival” and “The Adam Project,” and concerns a grieving father who, after losing his wife, sends a message out into the stars…and something out there starts to talk back.

Levyhas recently wrapped production on “Star Wars: Starfighter” starring Ryan Gosling, Amy Adams, Matt Smith, Mia Goth and Aaron Pierre. The film will hit theaters on May 28, 2027.

Levy’s projects have included “Stranger Things” and  “All the Light We Cannot See.”

The Levy-directed film “Deadpool & Wolverine”generated $1.086 billionat the global box office and is the highest grossing R-rated movie in history.Taxe teamed with 21 Laps previously on his screenplay “Ripple,” in which Jack Quaid is attached to star. His credits also include “Moonshot,” which starred Lana Condor and Cole Sprouse for HBO Max.

21 Laps is about to wrap production on both the Netflix comedy “One Attempt Remaining,” directed by Kay Cannon and starring Jennifer Garner and John Cena, as well as on Netflix’s untitled hockey series starring Michelle Monaghan.

Levy and 21 Laps are repped by WME and Johnson Shapiro Slewett & Kole. Taxe is repped by UTA, Entertainment 360 and Jackoway Austen Tyerman.

The project was first reported by The Hollywood Reporter.
title_zh: 肖恩·萊維(Shawn Levy)將為Netflix執導原創科幻劇情片《某處在那裡》(Somewhere Out There)。
content_zh:
由Jazz Tangcay報導

工匠編輯

肖恩·萊維(Shawn Levy)將為Netflix執導原創科幻電影《某處在那裡》(Somewhere Out There)。

這家串流平台在競標戰中獲得了由麥克斯·塔克斯(Max Taxe)撰寫的劇本。萊維將在他的21 Laps製作公司下製作這部電影，並與公司的丹·萊文(Dan Levine)共同合作。

故事情節帶有情感色彩，類似於《降臨》(Arrival)和《亞當計畫》(The Adam Project)，講述一位失去妻子的悲傷父親，向星空發送了一條信息……而那裡的某些東西開始回應他。

萊維最近完成了由瑞安·高斯林(Ryan Gosling)、艾米·亞當斯(Amy Adams)、馬特·史密斯(Matt Smith)、米婭·高斯(Mia Goth)和亞倫·皮爾(Aaron Pierre)主演的《星際大戰：星際戰鬥機》(Star Wars: Starfighter)的製作。該電影將於2027年5月28日上映。

萊維的項目包括《怪奇物語》(Stranger Things)和《我們看不見的光》(All the Light We Cannot See)。

萊維執導的電影《死侍與金剛狼》(Deadpool & Wolverine)在全球票房創下了10.86億美元，成為歷史上最高票房的R級電影。塔克斯之前與21 Laps合作過他的劇本《漣漪》(Ripple)，該片由傑克·奎德(Jack Quaid)主演。他的作品還包括為HBO Max製作的《月球任務》(Moonshot)，該片由拉娜·康多(Lana Condor)和科爾·斯普勞斯(Cole Sprouse)主演。

21 Laps即將完成Netflix喜劇《剩餘一次嘗試》(One Attempt Remaining)的製作，該片由凱·坎農(Kay Cannon)執導，珍妮佛·加納(Jennifer Garner)和約翰·塞納(John Cena)主演，以及Netflix的無標題冰球系列，主演為米歇爾·莫納漢(Michelle Monaghan)。

萊維和21 Laps由WME及約翰遜·沙皮羅·斯魯特與科爾(Johnson Shapiro Slewett & Kole)代理。塔克斯則由UTA、Entertainment 360和傑克威·奧斯汀·泰爾曼(Jackoway Austen Tyerman)代理。

該項目最早由《好萊塢報導》(The Hollywood Reporter)報導。
summary_zh:
由Jazz Tangcay報導

工匠編輯

肖恩·萊維(Shawn Levy)將為Netflix執導原創科幻電影《某處在那裡》(Somewhere Out There)。

這家串流平台在競標戰中獲得了由麥克斯·塔克斯(Max Taxe)撰寫的劇本。萊維將在他的21 Laps製作公司下製作這部電影，並與公司的丹·萊文(Dan Levine)共同合作。
